layout.back_accessibility_label: Go back to previous onboarding step
layout.back_accessibility_hint: Returns to the previous onboarding screen
layout.skip_accessibility_hint: Skips this step and applies default values
layout.next_accessibility_hint: Moves to the next onboarding step

personal_info.title: Tell us about you
personal_info.subtitle: Add the profile details we'll use across your projects. Your name is required to continue.
personal_info.contact_unavailable_error: We couldn't use those contact details for a new account. Please review them or sign in if you already have an account.
personal_info.contact_validation_error: We couldn't verify your contact details right now. Please try again.
personal_info.full_name_accessibility_hint: Enter your full name. This field is required.
personal_info.phone_number_accessibility_hint: Pre-filled from your account and read only
personal_info.job_title_accessibility_hint: Optional field for your role title
personal_info.email_accessibility_hint: Optional field. Enter a valid email format.

profile_photo.title: Add a profile photo
profile_photo.subtitle: Optional, but helps teammates recognize you across projects and Connections.
profile_photo.permission_message: Camera or photo library access is required.
profile_photo.permission_source_message: PulseBuild needs {{source}} access to add a profile photo.
profile_photo.camera_accessibility_hint: Opens camera to take a square profile photo
profile_photo.library_accessibility_hint: Opens photo library to pick a profile photo
profile_photo.remove_accessibility_hint: Removes the currently selected profile photo
profile_photo.skip_hint: You can skip this step and add a photo later in Settings.
profile_photo.continue_disabled_hint: Add a photo to enable Continue, or use Skip if you want to finish this later.
profile_photo.camera_permission_required: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
profile_photo.camera_error: Failed to open camera. Please try again.
profile_photo.library_permission_required: Photo library permission is required to choose an image.
profile_photo.library_error: Failed to open photo library. Please try again.

notifications.title: Stay in the loop
notifications.subtitle: Enable notifications to get timely updates on projects and tasks.
benefits: Get alerted when tasks are assigned to you.
Know immediately when task statuses change.

welcome.title: Welcome, {{name}}!
welcome.subtitle: You're ready to manage project work online or offline and grow your Connections network.

feature_highlights.title: Project work stays available offline
feature_highlights.description: Open project details, tasks, defects, diaries, timesheets, and saved updates while you're on site with patchy signal.

feature_highlights.title: Connections help you assemble teams
feature_highlights.description: Use Connections to keep trusted builders, contractors, and workers close at hand for future invites and collaboration.

generic_next_steps: Start collaborating through project memberships and assignments
